title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Reliance Footprint

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Reliance Footprint
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Reliance Footprint in Allahabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Reliance Footprint:
Reliance Footprint is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Footprint!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
